{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Commander Nelthan
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nelthan]] is a [[Commander]] of the [[GSS Kholien]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Captain Vallenar, this is Commander Nelthan of GSS Kholien.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
